hooks.prompt: Evaluate if specialized project knowledge was discovered during this session that should be captured as scoped .claude/rules/ files. Worth capturing: complex multi-component interactions, error recovery procedures, deep system patterns, framework/library quirks, patterns that would save significant time if known upfront. NOT worth capturing: one-off fixes, knowledge already in existing rules, generic programming knowledge. If significant knowledge was discovered, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Significant knowledge was discovered. Please invoke /knowledge-capture to package it before stopping."}. Otherwise respond {"ok": true}. Context: $ARGUMENTS

Verify task completion: check acceptance criteria, ensure tests pass, and update task status in the activity log. If there is no task context (general session without defined tasks), respond {"ok": true}. Context: $ARGUMENTS
